name: account.list.subscribed-calendar
title: Status Account List Subscribed Calendar
description: A status report of the client's subscribed calendars.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: A list of status values for the subscribed calendars.

subkeys.content: A status report of the client's subscribed calendar details.

subkeys.title: Unique identifier of the subscribed calendar.
subkeys.content: The unique identifier for the subscribed calendar.

subkeys.title: Indicates removal of the subscribed calendar.
subkeys.content: If `true`, the subscribed calendar is removed and the status item object only contains this key and the `identifier` key.

subkeys.title: Identifier of the declaration that installed the subscribed calendar.
subkeys.content: The identifier of the declaration that installed the subscribed calendar. Only present if a declaration installed the subscribed calendar.

subkeys.title: Subscribed calendar name
subkeys.content: The name of the subscribed calendar.

subkeys.title: Subscribed calendar URL
subkeys.content: The URL of the subscribed calendar.

subkeys.title: Subscribed calendar username
subkeys.content: The user name for authenticating with the subscribed calendar.

subkeys.title: Is the calendar enabled
subkeys.content: A Boolean value that indicates whether the Calendar app displays this subscribed calendar.
